name: Stuffed Filet Mignon with Red Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp sweet butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a 1-inch slit in each filet mignon.
2. Insert a paring knife through the slit and cut out a pocket inside the filet.
3. Stuff the filets with alternating layers of cheese and mushrooms, ending with mushrooms on top.
4. Press the slit together to close it.
5. In a large skillet, heat the melted butter over medium-high until hot.
6. Add the stuffed filets and sauté for 4 to 6 minutes on each side or until desired doneness is achieved.
7. Pour the red wine sauce over the top of the filets.
- RED WINE SAUCE -
1. In a small saucepan, combine red wine and shallots; cook over medium-high until reduced to 3 tablespoons, about 4 to 6 minutes.
2. Add veal stock and reduce the sauce by one-fourth for 15 minutes.
3. Whisk in butter pieces one at a time while cooking on low heat.
4. Season with salt and stir it in before serving.
